mnemonics.title: CDD - System Architectures
mnemonics.content:
**C**entralized - One boss controls everything
**D**istributed - Work spread across many, may have coordinator
**D**ecentralized - No boss at all, everyone is equal (blockchain!)

mnemonics.title: FCNR - Blockchain Distributed Challenges
mnemonics.content:
**F**ault tolerance - survive node failures
**C**onsensus - agree without central authority
**N**etwork partitions - handle splits
**R**eplication - keep copies synchronized

mnemonics.title: PIG - P2P Network Properties
mnemonics.content:
**P**eer equality - no hierarchy
**I**ndependent nodes - each validates
**G**ossip protocol - spread information

mnemonics.title: TIDE - Why Blockchain is Distributed
mnemonics.content:
**T**rustless operation
**I**mmutable shared ledger
**D**ecentralized consensus
**E**very node has full copy
